metadata.description: Planning skills for client discovery, PRD creation, and dev handoff

plugins.name: ask
plugins.description: Discovery interview to pressure-test ideas and gather requirements

plugins.name: blueprint
plugins.description: Create a PRD through structured interview, submitted as a GitHub issue

plugins.name: carve
plugins.description: Break a PRD into phased vertical slices, saved to ./plans/

plugins.name: dispatch
plugins.description: Convert a PRD into dependency-ordered GitHub issues for dev handoff

plugins.name: lean
plugins.description: MVP advisor — flags over-engineering and enforces simplicity
